_comment: Optional manual curation applied by import-icici-master.ts (step 6) AFTER the automatic cross-walk. Empty by default. ProviderRtoCode is now LINE-AWARE (the import stores a code per vehicle line from the Private-Car / Two-Wheeler / CV RTO CSVs), so the earlier 2W-RTO band-aid is no longer needed and has been removed. Add entries here only to correct a genuinely wrong/missing auto-mapping. rto[].line is the vehicle line the code applies to: "tw" | "fw" | "cv" | "all". mmv entries pin a canonical make/model to specific ICICI make/model codes.
